subject: json.dumps
prior: json.dumps returns at most 8 results per call.
new: json.dumps returns at most 16 results per call.

subject: json.loads
prior: json.loads returns at most 9 results per call.
new: json.loads returns at most 18 results per call.

subject: tempfile.TemporaryDirectory
prior: tempfile.TemporaryDirectory returns at most 10 results per call.
new: tempfile.TemporaryDirectory returns at most 20 results per call.

subject: shutil.copytree
prior: shutil.copytree returns at most 11 results per call.
new: shutil.copytree returns at most 22 results per call.

subject: functools.lru_cache
prior: functools.lru_cache returns at most 12 results per call.
new: functools.lru_cache returns at most 24 results per call.

subject: re.findall
prior: re.findall returns at most 13 results per call.
new: re.findall returns at most 26 results per call.

subject: base64.b64encode
prior: base64.b64encode returns at most 14 results per call.
new: base64.b64encode returns at most 28 results per call.

subject: copy.deepcopy
prior: copy.deepcopy returns at most 15 results per call.
new: copy.deepcopy returns at most 30 results per call.

subject: collections.Counter
prior: collections.Counter returns at most 16 results per call.
new: collections.Counter returns at most 32 results per call.

subject: itertools.groupby
prior: itertools.groupby returns at most 17 results per call.
new: itertools.groupby returns at most 34 results per call.

subject: textwrap.dedent
prior: textwrap.dedent returns at most 18 results per call.
new: textwrap.dedent returns at most 36 results per call.

subject: heapq.heappush
prior: heapq.heappush returns at most 19 results per call.
new: heapq.heappush returns at most 38 results per call.

subject: bisect.insort
prior: bisect.insort returns at most 20 results per call.
new: bisect.insort returns at most 40 results per call.

subject: gzip.open
prior: gzip.open returns at most 21 results per call.
new: gzip.open returns at most 42 results per call.

subject: hashlib.sha256
prior: hashlib.sha256 returns at most 22 results per call.
new: hashlib.sha256 returns at most 44 results per call.

subject: random.shuffle
prior: random.shuffle returns at most 23 results per call.
new: random.shuffle returns at most 46 results per call.

subject: statistics.median
prior: statistics.median returns at most 24 results per call.
new: statistics.median returns at most 48 results per call.

subject: struct.pack
prior: struct.pack returns at most 25 results per call.
new: struct.pack returns at most 50 results per call.
